name: Dave Smith
blurb: Dave Smith is an American comedian, podcaster, and libertarian political commentator who hosts the podcast Part of the Problem and co-hosts Legion of Skanks.
bio: Dave Smith is an American comedian, podcaster, and libertarian political commentator who hosts the podcast Part of the Problem and co-hosts Legion of Skanks. A frequent guest on The Joe Rogan Experience and a member of the Libertarian Party's Mises Caucus, he blends stand-up with anti-war and anti-establishment politics. His debut special, Libertas, was released in 2017.

timeline.ev: Featured as a New Face at the Just For Laughs festival
Releases his debut special Libertas via GaS Digital
Speaks at the Libertarian National Convention
